nasb.text: Then Jesus *said to him, “Put your sword back into its place; for all those who take up the sword shall perish by the sword.

esv.text: Then Jesus said to him, “Put your sword back into its place. For all who take the sword will perish by the sword.

cnv.text: 耶穌對他說：“把你的刀收回原處！凡動刀的必死在刀下。

ccb.text: 耶稣对他说：“收刀入鞘吧！因为动刀的必死在刀下。

csbs.text: 耶稣就对他说：“把你的刀收回原处！因为凡动刀的，必死在刀下。
